sinks.expression:
printf( '
%s
', wp_kses_post( $message ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'Object cache could not be flushed.', 'redis-cache' ) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
            "DELETE FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name LIKE %s OR option_name LIKE %s",
            '_transient_%',
            '_site_transient_%'
        ) )
printf( esc_html__( 'Check out %s', 'redis-cache' ), 'Object Cache Pro' )

printf(
                                            // translators: %s = PHP Version.
                                            esc_html__( 'The current version of PHP (%s) is too old. PHP 7.2 or newer is required.', 'redis-cache' ),
                                            esc_html( phpversion() )
                                        )

printf(
                                            // translators: %s = Version of the PhpRedis extension.
                                            esc_html__( 'The current version of the PhpRedis extension (%s) is too old. PhpRedis 3.1.1 or newer is required.', 'redis-cache' ),
                                            esc_html( phpversion( 'redis' ) )
                                        )

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post( __( 'A business class object cache backend. Truly reliable, highly-optimized and fully customizable, with a dedicated engineer when you most need it. Learn more »', 'redis-cache' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'Object Cache Pro is a business class object cache that’s highly-optimized for WooCommerce to provide true reliability, peace of mind and faster load times for your store. Learn more »', 'redis-cache' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "DELETE FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name LIKE %s OR option_name LIKE %s",
            '_transient_%',
            '_site_transient_%'
        )
wp_kses_post( __( 'A business class object cache backend. Truly reliable, highly-optimized and fully customizable, with a dedicated engineer when you most need it.', 'redis-cache' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Your site does not meet the requirements for the Pro version:', 'redis-cache' ) )
